zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Deincourt於大約1363年出生在英國林可爾史爾林肯時，她的父親William Deincourt II38歲，母親Margaret de Welles38歲。她於大約1376年與Sir William de Clinton在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍可尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1400年在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Deincourt于大约1363年出生在英国林可爾史爾林肯时，她的父亲William Deincourt II38岁，母亲Margaret de Welles38岁。她于大约1376年与Sir William de Clinton在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍可尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1400年在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Deincourt was born about 1363, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, her father, William Deincourt II, was 38 and her mother, Margaret de Welles, was 38. She married Sir William de Clinton about 1376, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1400, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Deincourt est née environ 1363, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William Deincourt II, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Welles, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Clinton environ 1376, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1400, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Deincourt um 1363 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Deincourt II 38 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Welles 38. Sie hat um 1376 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William de Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1400 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Deincourt è nata il circa 1363 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, William Deincourt II, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Welles, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Clinton circa 1376, nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1400, nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Deincourtが約1363年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父William Deincourt IIは38歳，母Margaret de Wellesは38歳であった。約1376年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーでSir William de Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1400年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Deincourt(이)가 대략 1363년 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Deincourt II(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Welles(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 블랭니에서 Sir William de Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Deincourt nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Deincourt II, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Welles, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Clinton aproximadamente 1376, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1400, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Deincourt родилась около 1363 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Deincourt II было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Welles, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Clinton около 1376 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1400 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Deincourt nació aproximadamente 1363, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Deincourt II, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret de Welles, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir William de Clinton aproximadamente 1376, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1400, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años.
